tasks.label: Test App (container)
tasks.command: docker compose run --rm ytmusic pytest tests -v

tasks.label: Test and Push
tasks.command: docker compose build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 1 }; docker compose run --rm ytmusic pytest tests -v; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 1 }; Get-Content ../.env | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^#' -and $_ -match '=' } | ForEach-Object { $k,$v = $_ -split '=',2; [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable($k.Trim(), $v.Trim()) }; docker build --no-cache -t auto-downloader:latest .; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 1 }; docker tag auto-downloader:latest "$env:DOCKER_USER/auto-downloader:latest"; docker push "$env:DOCKER_USER/auto-downloader:latest"
